name: workspace-save-open
description: Save current tabs as a named workspace, list, and re-open.

steps.expect: async (response, ctx) => { const createdTabs = []; ctx.deps.createTab = (url, active) => { const t = { id: 100 + createdTabs.length, url, title: url }; createdTabs.push(t); return t; }; ctx.deps.switchTab = (id) => { ctx.deps._activeTabId = id; return true; }; const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceSave({ name: 'work' }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'save ok'}, {ok: r.tabCount >= 1, message: 'tabCount reported'} ]; }
async (response, ctx) => { const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceList(); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'list ok'}, {ok: Array.isArray(r.workspaces), message: 'workspaces is array'} ]; }
async (response, ctx) => { const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceOpen({ name: 'work' }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'open ok'}, {ok: r.openedCount >= 1, message: 'opened some tabs'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceOpen({ name: 'nonexistent-' + Date.now() }); return [ {ok: r.ok === false, message: 'missing workspace should fail'}, {ok: r.error.includes('not found'), message: 'error mentions not found'} ]; }

async (response, ctx) => { await ctx.agent.workspaceSave({ name: 'temporary' }); const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceDelete({ name: 'temporary' }); return [ {ok: r.ok === true, message: 'delete ok'} ]; }
async (response, ctx) => { const r = await ctx.agent.workspaceDelete({ name: 'never-existed' }); return [ {ok: r.ok === false, message: 'delete missing returns false'} ]; }
